sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports running approximately 10 kilometers three times per week. He states this is a consistent routine and he feels good about it. He denies any recent injuries.

sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 128/78 mmHg. Heart rate is 72 bpm and regular. Neurological exam is unremarkable. Gait is normal.
